# Resource Manager API, gRPC: ProjectService.ListProjects

Returns a paginated list of projects under the specified workspace UUID.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc ListProjects (ListProjectsRequest) returns (ListProjectsResponse)
```

## ListProjectsRequest

Request to list projects in a workspace with pagination and optional filtering.

```json
{
  "workspace_id": "string",
  "page_size": 0,
  "page_token": "string",
  "filter": "string",
  "order_by": "string",
  "show_deleted": true
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| workspace_id | string | Required. Stable unique identifier of the parent workspace.<br/>The value must be a valid UUID string.<br/>In the HTTP API, pass this field in the query string. |
| page_size | int32 | Optional. The maximum number of projects to return.<br/>Valid values are in the range 0 to 1000.<br/>If omitted, the service returns up to 50 projects.<br/>The service may return fewer results than requested. |
| page_token | string | Optional. A page token returned by a previous `ListProjects` call.<br/>Use this field to retrieve the next page of results.<br/><br/>When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListProjects`<br/>must match the call that produced the page token.<br/>The token must not exceed 1024 characters. |
| filter | string | Optional. AIP-160 compatible filter expression.<br/>The expression must not exceed 1024 characters. |
| order_by | string | Optional. AIP-132 compatible ordering expression.<br/>The expression must not exceed 128 characters. |
| show_deleted | bool | Optional. If true, soft-deleted projects are included in the response. |

## ListProjectsResponse

One page of projects returned by ListProjects.

```json
{
  "projects": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "workspace_id": "string",
      "state": "State",
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "create_time": "string",
      "update_time": "string",
      "delete_time": "string",
      "purge_time": "string",
      "version": 0,
      "labels": {
        "key": "string"
      }
    }
  ],
  "next_page_token": "string",
  "total_size": 0
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| projects[] | Project | Projects returned for the current page. |
| next_page_token | string | Token to retrieve the next page.<br/>This field is empty when there are no more results. |
| total_size | int32 | The total number of projects that match the request. |

## Project

Project stores canonical metadata for a project resource within a workspace.

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "workspace_id": "string",
  "state": "State",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "create_time": "string",
  "update_time": "string",
  "delete_time": "string",
  "purge_time": "string",
  "version": 0,
  "labels": {
    "key": "string"
  }
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Identifier. Stable unique identifier of the project.<br/>The value is generated by the server and is returned as a UUID string.<br/>The value is immutable after creation.<br/>Clients must not provide this field when creating a project. |
| workspace_id | string | Output only. Stable unique identifier of the parent workspace.<br/>The value is set by the server from the create request and is returned as<br/>a UUID string. The parent workspace of a project never changes. |
| state | enum State | Output only. Server-computed lifecycle state of the project.<br/>The value is always one of the defined non-zero enum values.<br/><br/>Available values: `STATE_UNSPECIFIED`, `CREATING`, `ACTIVE`, `ARCHIVED`, `DELETING`, `DELETED`, `FAILED`. |
| name | string | Optional. Human-readable name of the project.<br/>The value may be updated by clients and must not exceed 256 characters. |
| description | string | Optional. Free-form description of the project.<br/>The value may be updated by clients and must not exceed 1024 characters. |
| create_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the project was created. |
| update_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the project was most recently updated. |
| delete_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the project was soft-deleted. |
| purge_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the soft-deleted project is scheduled to be purged. |
| version | int64 | Optional. Resource version used for optimistic concurrency control.<br/>If this value is provided on update or delete, it must exactly match the<br/>current server-side version or the request is rejected. Clients must not set<br/>this field when creating a project. |
| labels | map<string, string> | Optional. Client-provided labels for tooling and integrations.<br/>Use namespaced keys such as "example.com/key" to avoid collisions between<br/>independent producers of labels. |

## State

State describes the lifecycle state of a project resource.

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| STATE_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | Invalid value. Stored resources and API responses must not use this state. |
| CREATING | 1 | The project is being created. |
| ACTIVE | 2 | The project is active and available for use. |
| ARCHIVED | 3 | The project is archived. |
| DELETING | 4 | The project is being deleted. |
| DELETED | 5 | The project has been deleted. |
| FAILED | 6 | The project entered a failed state. |
